# Data Center Technician Trainee

Company: NorthStar Data GmbH
Location: Berlin, Germany
Exact workplace: NorthStar Campus, Alexanderufer 3, 10117 Berlin
Employment: Full-time
Contract type: Permanent
Salary: €36,000 gross per year
Languages: English required; German is a plus
Education: Completed IT vocational training or comparable education
Experience: Entry level; no professional experience required
Skills: PC hardware, server installation, Linux, cable management
Certifications: CompTIA A+ preferred
Shift: Rotating shifts including night work
On-call: On-call rotation required
Car: No own car required
Physical: Ability to lift up to 20 kg
Training: Structured trainee programme and mentor
Seniority: Trainee / junior
Deadline: 2026-08-31
